name: update_noc_qos
full_help:
update_noc_qos

Description: 
Update the NoC solution

Syntax: 
update_noc_qos  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Force update even if the existing solution is invalid
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Tools

arguments.description: Force update even if the existing solution is invalid
Suspend message limits during command execution
